meaningTh: ใบแจ้งหนี้
meaningEn: a list of goods sent or services provided, with a statement of the sum due
examples: Please send the invoice by Friday.

meaningTh: ใบเสร็จรับเงิน
meaningEn: a written acknowledgment that something has been paid for
examples: Please keep the receipt for your records.

meaningTh: รายได้
meaningEn: income generated from business operations
examples: The company's revenue increased by 15% this quarter.

meaningTh: งบประมาณ
meaningEn: an estimate of income and expenditure for a set period
examples: We need to stay within the budget for this project.

meaningTh: ค่าใช้จ่าย
meaningEn: the cost incurred in or required for something
examples: Please submit your expense report by the end of the month.

meaningTh: กำไร
meaningEn: financial gain after deducting costs
examples: The company reported a net profit of $2 million.

meaningTh: เงินคืน
meaningEn: a repayment of a sum of money
examples: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase.

meaningTh: ใบเสนอราคา
meaningEn: a formal statement of the cost of goods or services
examples: We received a quotation from three different vendors.

meaningTh: การทำธุรกรรม
meaningEn: an instance of buying or selling something
examples: All transactions are recorded in the system automatically.

meaningTh: การลงทุน
meaningEn: the action of investing money for profit
examples: The investment in new technology paid off quickly.

meaningTh: หัวหน้างาน
meaningEn: a person who oversees workers or the work done by others
examples: Please check with your supervisor before leaving early.

meaningTh: เพื่อนร่วมงาน
meaningEn: a person with whom one works
examples: I will ask my colleague to help with the presentation.

meaningTh: กำหนดเวลาส่ง
meaningEn: the latest time or date by which something should be completed
examples: The deadline for the proposal is next Friday.

meaningTh: การนัดหมาย
meaningEn: an arrangement to meet someone at a particular time
examples: I have an appointment with the dentist at 3 PM.

meaningTh: แผนก
meaningEn: a division of a large organization
examples: The sales department exceeded its target this quarter.

meaningTh: บันทึกข้อความ
meaningEn: a written message in business or diplomacy
examples: A memorandum was sent to all employees regarding the policy change.

meaningTh: วาระการประชุม
meaningEn: a list of items to be discussed at a meeting
examples: The first item on the agenda is the budget review.

meaningTh: เครื่องเขียน
meaningEn: materials needed for writing, such as paper and pens
examples: Please order more stationery for the front desk.

meaningTh: สิ่งอำนวยความสะดวก / สถานที่
meaningEn: a place or building used for a particular purpose
examples: The new facility will open next month.

meaningTh: ผู้สมัคร
meaningEn: a person who applies for something, especially a job
examples: All applicants must submit their resumes by Monday.

meaningTh: ผู้สมัคร (ที่ผ่านการคัดเลือก)
meaningEn: a person who has been selected as suitable for a position
examples: We have three strong candidates for the position.

meaningTh: ประวัติย่อ
meaningEn: a brief account of a person's education and professional experience
examples: Please attach your resume to the application form.

meaningTh: คุณสมบัติ
meaningEn: a quality or accomplishment that makes someone suitable for a role
examples: A bachelor's degree is a minimum qualification for this role.

meaningTh: รับสมัคร / สรรหา
meaningEn: to find and hire new employees
examples: The company plans to recruit 50 new engineers this year.

meaningTh: ช่วงทดลองงาน
meaningEn: a period of testing or observing a new employee
examples: New employees are on probation for the first three months.

meaningTh: เงินเดือน
meaningEn: a fixed regular payment for employment
examples: The position offers a competitive salary and benefits.

meaningTh: สวัสดิการ / ผลประโยชน์
meaningEn: an advantage or profit gained from something
examples: The job comes with excellent health benefits.

meaningTh: บุคคลอ้างอิง
meaningEn: a person who provides information about someone's character or ability
examples: Please provide two professional references with your application.

meaningTh: กำหนดการเดินทาง
meaningEn: a planned route or journey
examples: The travel itinerary includes stops in three cities.

meaningTh: การออกเดินทาง
meaningEn: the action of leaving a place
examples: The departure time has been changed to 10:30 AM.

meaningTh: การมาถึง
meaningEn: the action of reaching a destination
examples: Upon arrival, please proceed to the information desk.

meaningTh: กระเป๋าเดินทาง
meaningEn: suitcases or bags for a traveler's belongings
examples: Please keep your luggage with you at all times.

meaningTh: การขึ้นเครื่อง
meaningEn: the act of getting on an aircraft, ship, or train
examples: Boarding will begin at Gate 12 in twenty minutes.

meaningTh: จุดหมายปลายทาง
meaningEn: the place to which someone is going
examples: Our final destination is Bangkok.

meaningTh: จัดที่พักให้ / รองรับ
meaningEn: to provide lodging or space for
examples: The hotel can accommodate up to 200 guests.

meaningTh: หนังสือเดินทาง
meaningEn: an official document for international travel
examples: Make sure your passport is valid for at least six months.

meaningTh: ความล่าช้า
meaningEn: a period of time by which something is late
examples: Due to bad weather, there will be a two-hour delay.

meaningTh: ข้อร้องเรียน
meaningEn: a statement that something is unsatisfactory
examples: We received a complaint about the late delivery.

meaningTh: การสอบถาม
meaningEn: an act of asking for information
examples: For any inquiries, please contact our customer service team.

meaningTh: ตัวแทน
meaningEn: a person chosen to act or speak for others
examples: A representative will assist you shortly.

meaningTh: ความพึงพอใจ
meaningEn: fulfillment of one's wishes or expectations
examples: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.

meaningTh: การรับประกัน
meaningEn: a written guarantee of product quality
examples: The product comes with a two-year warranty.

meaningTh: ขอโทษ
meaningEn: to express regret for something done wrong
examples: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused.

meaningTh: แก้ไข / คลี่คลาย
meaningEn: to find a solution to a problem
examples: Our team will resolve the issue within 24 hours.

meaningTh: ข้อเสนอแนะ / ความคิดเห็น
meaningEn: information about reactions to a product or performance
examples: We appreciate your feedback on our services.

meaningTh: แลกเปลี่ยน / เปลี่ยนสินค้า
meaningEn: to give something and receive something in return
examples: You may exchange the item within 14 days of purchase.

meaningTh: การส่งเสริมการขาย / การเลื่อนตำแหน่ง
meaningEn: activity supporting advertising, or advancement in rank
examples: The store is running a promotion on electronics this week.

meaningTh: โฆษณา
meaningEn: a notice or announcement promoting a product or service
examples: We placed an advertisement in the local newspaper.

meaningTh: ส่วนลด
meaningEn: a reduction in the usual price
examples: Members receive a 20% discount on all purchases.

meaningTh: แคมเปญ / การรณรงค์
meaningEn: an organized course of action to achieve a goal
examples: The marketing campaign increased brand awareness significantly.

meaningTh: ผู้บริโภค
meaningEn: a person who purchases goods and services
examples: Consumer demand for organic products has increased.

meaningTh: คู่แข่ง
meaningEn: a person or company engaged in competition
examples: Our main competitor has launched a new product line.

meaningTh: แบรนด์ / ยี่ห้อ
meaningEn: a type of product made by a particular company
examples: Building brand awareness is essential for new products.

meaningTh: แบบสำรวจ
meaningEn: an investigation of opinions or behavior
examples: We conducted a survey to understand customer preferences.

meaningTh: เป้าหมาย
meaningEn: an objective or result aimed at
examples: The sales team exceeded its quarterly target.

meaningTh: การจัดส่งสินค้า
meaningEn: the action of shipping goods or a quantity of goods shipped
examples: The shipment will arrive within five business days.

meaningTh: การจัดส่ง
meaningEn: the action of delivering goods
examples: We offer free delivery on orders over $50.

meaningTh: คลังสินค้า
meaningEn: a large building for storing goods
examples: The goods are stored in our main warehouse.

meaningTh: การติดตาม
meaningEn: the act of following the progress or movement of something
examples: You can check the status using the tracking number provided.

meaningTh: สินค้าที่ขนส่ง / ค่าขนส่ง
meaningEn: goods transported by truck, ship, or aircraft
examples: The freight charges will be added to the final invoice.

meaningTh: ศุลกากร
meaningEn: the official department that checks goods entering a country
examples: The package is currently held at customs for inspection.

meaningTh: ส่งออก / จัดส่ง
meaningEn: to send off goods or messages to a destination
examples: Your order has been dispatched and will arrive tomorrow.

meaningTh: สินค้าคงคลัง
meaningEn: a complete list of items in stock
examples: We need to take inventory before placing new orders.

meaningTh: แจกจ่าย / กระจาย
meaningEn: to give shares of something to a number of recipients
examples: The company distributes its products to over 50 countries.

meaningTh: การจอง
meaningEn: an arrangement to have something held for one's use
examples: I'd like to make a reservation for two at 7 PM.

meaningTh: ที่พัก
meaningEn: a room or building in which someone may live or stay
examples: The conference fee includes accommodation for three nights.

meaningTh: ว่าง / มีให้
meaningEn: able to be used or obtained
examples: There are no rooms available for this weekend.

meaningTh: งานเลี้ยง
meaningEn: an elaborate and formal meal for many people
examples: The company will host a banquet for its annual celebration.

meaningTh: ฟรี / ไม่เสียค่าใช้จ่าย
meaningEn: given free of charge
examples: The hotel offers complimentary breakfast for all guests.

meaningTh: การเช็คเอาท์
meaningEn: the act of leaving a hotel or paying for goods
examples: Checkout time is 12 noon.

meaningTh: อาหาร / ประเภทอาหาร
meaningEn: a style of cooking characteristic of a country or region
examples: The restaurant is famous for its Thai cuisine.

meaningTh: ห้องว่าง / ตำแหน่งว่าง
meaningEn: an unoccupied position or room
examples: The hotel has no vacancy during the holiday season.

meaningTh: สิ่งอำนวยความสะดวก
meaningEn: a desirable or useful feature of a building or place
examples: The hotel offers amenities such as a pool and gym.

meaningTh: เครื่องพิมพ์
meaningEn: a machine for printing text or pictures
examples: The printer on the third floor is out of ink.

meaningTh: เครื่องถ่ายเอกสาร
meaningEn: a machine that makes copies of documents
examples: Please use the copier in the supply room for large jobs.

meaningTh: เครื่องฉาย
meaningEn: a device for projecting images onto a surface
examples: Could you set up the projector for the presentation?

meaningTh: การบำรุงรักษา
meaningEn: the process of keeping something in good condition
examples: Regular maintenance of equipment is essential to avoid breakdowns.

meaningTh: การทำงานผิดปกติ
meaningEn: a failure to function in a normal manner
examples: A malfunction in the system caused a temporary shutdown.

meaningTh: ติดตั้ง
meaningEn: to place equipment in position ready for use
examples: The technician will install the new software tomorrow.

meaningTh: เปลี่ยนทดแทน
meaningEn: to take the place of something or provide a substitute
examples: We need to replace the old computers in the office.

meaningTh: อุปกรณ์
meaningEn: a thing made for a particular purpose
examples: Please turn off all electronic devices during the meeting.

meaningTh: ตลับหมึก
meaningEn: a container holding ink for a printer
examples: We need to order new ink cartridges for the printer.

meaningTh: ยืนยัน
meaningEn: to establish the truth or correctness of something
examples: Please confirm your attendance by Thursday.

meaningTh: ยื่น / ส่ง
meaningEn: to present for consideration or judgment
examples: Please submit the report before the deadline.

meaningTh: ต้องการ / กำหนดให้
meaningEn: to need something or make something necessary
examples: All employees are required to attend the training session.

meaningTh: เข้าร่วม
meaningEn: to be present at an event or meeting
examples: Over 200 people attended the annual conference.

meaningTh: ซื้อ
meaningEn: to buy something
examples: Employees may purchase office supplies through the company portal.

meaningTh: จัดหาให้ / ให้
meaningEn: to make available for use; supply
examples: Please provide your contact information on the form.

meaningTh: นำไปปฏิบัติ
meaningEn: to put a plan or system into operation
examples: The company will implement the new policy starting next month.

meaningTh: เจรจาต่อรอง
meaningEn: to discuss something to reach an agreement
examples: We are currently negotiating the terms of the contract.

meaningTh: อนุมัติ / ให้อำนาจ
meaningEn: to give official permission for something
examples: Only the manager can authorize expenses over $1,000.

meaningTh: เลื่อนออกไป
meaningEn: to delay an event to a later time
examples: The meeting has been postponed until next Wednesday.

meaningTh: ปฏิบัติตาม
meaningEn: to act in accordance with rules or requests
examples: All businesses must comply with safety regulations.

meaningTh: แจ้งให้ทราบ
meaningEn: to formally inform someone of something
examples: Please notify us at least 48 hours before cancellation.

meaningTh: ประเมิน
meaningEn: to evaluate or estimate the nature or quality of something
examples: The manager will assess employee performance at the end of the quarter.

meaningTh: จัดสรร
meaningEn: to distribute resources for a particular purpose
examples: The committee will allocate funds for the new project.

meaningTh: ชดใช้คืน
meaningEn: to repay a person who has spent money
examples: The company will reimburse you for travel expenses.

meaningTh: แก้ไข / ปรับปรุง
meaningEn: to reconsider and alter something
examples: Please revise the proposal and resubmit it by Friday.

meaningTh: สอบถาม
meaningEn: to ask for information
examples: She called to inquire about the job opening.
